name: TOB Brand Story (Default)
description: Pitch marketing storytelling : trader struggling → discovers TOB → success. 6 scènes Pollinations + Ken Burns + captions + narration TTS + outro lion. ~48s. Pour socials TikTok/Reels.

scenes.caption: The Downward Spiral.
scenes.narration: Back in the deep red. A brutal three thousand two hundred dollar loss this week alone. That heavy silence with his wife — he couldn't bring himself to say a word.
scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic 9:16 vertical. Top-down overhead angle looking straight down at a dark walnut desk in a dim home office. Center: a laptop screen showing a brutal red P&L equity curve crashing from a peak of plus five thousand four hundred down to a low of minus three thousand two hundred dollars, with a sea of red candlestick bars below. Two side monitors visible at edges of the frame, both showing red declining charts. Two pale hands with white knuckles gripping the desk edge. Crumpled Red Bull can lying on its side, a half-eaten cup of instant ramen, a torn open envelope stamped FINAL NOTICE in red ink, scattered receipts. Sweat-stained black mousepad. Color palette: cold cyan-blue dominant with hot crimson monitor reflections. Single dim overhead pendant light. Cinematic depth, sharp focus on the laptop screen, slight motion blur on hands. Mood: financial catastrophe, suffocation, no escape. No face visible.

scenes.caption: The Toxic Cycle.
scenes.narration: The same fatal mistakes. A different chart, but the same crimson bleed across the screen.
scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic 9:16 vertical. Extreme macro close-up of a laptop trading platform screen filling nearly the entire frame. Visible UI: a stacked transaction history list with multiple red loss entries clearly readable — SPY minus 540, TSLA minus 1240, NVDA minus 890, META minus 310, AAPL minus 720. Today's date timestamp visible at the top of the interface. Coffee ring stains and fingerprint smudges on the glossy reflective screen. A faint hazy reflection of a stressed face barely visible in the screen glare, blurred and indistinct. The mouse cursor hovers on a glowing PLACE ORDER button. Color palette: deep oxblood red plus matte black plus sterile white UI text. Pure cold screen-light is the only illumination, surrounding environment in deep impenetrable shadow. Mood: addiction loop, mechanical despair, doom scroll. No clear face shown in the reflection.

scenes.caption: The Late-Night Obsession.
scenes.narration: Trapped in an endless loop. Cold, three AM nights. Again. A hollow promise: tomorrow is the big day.
scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic 9:16 vertical. Stark side-profile silhouette of a hooded trader slumped sideways in an office chair, back-lit dramatically by three red glowing monitors. In the foreground sharply in focus: a large round wall clock prominently reading 3:47 AM, a wall calendar with bold red X marks crossing out ten consecutive days. On the desk: a smartphone tilted up showing a bank app screen with the words AVAILABLE COLON THREE THOUSAND ONE HUNDRED FORTY TWO DOLLARS in red, an open white prescription pill bottle on its side with pills scattered, a stack of unopened mail topped by an envelope stamped FINAL NOTICE in bold red ink. Window blinds in the background cast harsh sodium-yellow streetlight stripes across the entire room. Color palette: muddy sickly yellow-green sodium streetlight mixed with cold deep blue. Faded color grade, fine film grain. Mood: insomnia, dependency, breaking point. Silhouette only, no face shown.

scenes.caption: The Discovery.
scenes.narration: Then, he found the Temple of Boom. Real, seasoned traders. Precision setups. Raw, live action.
scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic 9:16 vertical. Extreme macro close-up of a smartphone held vertically in a hand, with a slight Dutch tilt for dramatic tension. The phone screen displays a Discord channel clearly labeled Temple of Boom with a gold lion emoji header at top. Visible chat messages flowing in: ENTRY TSLA 245.50 target 252, EXIT plus 1840 dollars with green check, FOMC setup live now, who is in. Multiple trader avatar circles and usernames visible such as boomking, analyst bora, sniper. Live green typing indicators pulse at the bottom. The bright phone screen casts a warm green-gold glow on the trader's chin and lower face only, no eyes visible. This is the first warm light in an otherwise icy blue room. Color palette transitions from cold cyan room into warm gold-green from the phone. Lighting: phone screen as the only practical light source, dramatic chiaroscuro. Mood: revelation, fragile hope, the spark of curiosity. Detailed authentic Discord-style messaging UI.

scenes.caption: The Shift.
scenes.narration: Strict rules. A completely different game. Insane gains: plus fifty percent, plus one hundred percent, plus one hundred fifty percent only this week.
scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic 9:16 vertical. Heroic low-angle shot from below desk level looking UP at a confident standing trader, only the back of head and side profile visible, no clear face. Three giant ultra-wide monitors in the background showing explosive bright GREEN candlestick charts ripping upward at sharp angles. Bold large account balance overlay clearly readable on the main monitor reads TOTAL plus 150 percent. On the desk sharply in focus: three printed winning trade tickets stacked neatly, the first showing plus 50 percent in green, the middle showing plus 100 percent in green, the top one showing plus 150 percent in green. Hand confidently rested on a premium ergonomic gaming mouse. Crisp white tailored shirt sleeve visible. Strong golden sunbeam pouring through a wide floor-to-ceiling window in the background. Color palette: deep emerald green plus warm gold sunlight plus brass accents. Lighting: golden hour window light plus green monitor glow combine. Mood: dominance, mastery, unstoppable momentum, transformation complete.

scenes.caption: Join the pride.
scenes.narration: Join us. Success is no longer a distant dream. discord dot g g slash temple of boom.
scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic 9:16 vertical, ultra-wide framing. A luxurious modern penthouse home office at sunset, dominated by a massive floor-to-ceiling window revealing a stunning Miami-style skyline with skyscrapers glowing amber-orange in golden hour light, palm trees silhouetted in distance, ocean visible. The trader, back view only with no face, leans back relaxed in a premium black leather executive chair, hands clasped behind head in confident pose. Subtle visible luxury details on the dark walnut desk: a loose stack of 100 dollar bills, a sleek gold-tone luxury watch glinting on the wrist, a brass adjustable desk lamp, a single tumbler of amber whiskey on ice. Polished marble floor reflecting the warm light. Subtle faint green monitor glow on the right side of frame. Color palette: saturated amber-gold sunset plus fire orange plus deep walnut plus subtle green tech accent. Lighting: pure golden hour sun beams plus warm interior practical lights. Mood: arrival, hard-earned victory, the pride, premium success. Cinematic depth of field with soft bokeh on the city lights.
